falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a blowoff but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average on at least 3 days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a high-probability blowoff top scenario, contrary to the current HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the 2022 May Luna pattern's resistance level (3,750) and holds it for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the historical pattern's bearish implications, proving the current verdict incorrect by showing a clear bullish divergence.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
